text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Last one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is having a productive summer training camp, hitting all
of her targets with ease.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Hey hey! Where do you want to start at the festival tonight? I'm kinda
feelin' some candied apples!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget about the grilled carrots! Oh man, nighttime can't come
soon enough!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone training around us appears to be in high spirits. I suspect
that has something to do with the festival that will be taking place
nearby tonight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Why are you staring at me so much? Is there sand on my face?
choice_data_list:
No... It's just that I can't help but feel that
you're the same as ever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? Can you just make sure to time my next lap
properly?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Why would I be any different? I'm going to go for another lap, so
please keep my time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few hours after our training ends, I wander into the camp lodge.
The halls are eerily quiet, as most have likely made their way over to
the festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few hours after our training ends, I wander into the camp lodge.
The halls are eerily quiet, as most have likely made their way over to
the festival.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer? What are you doing here?
choice_data_list: Are you not going to the festival?
Are you not going to the festival?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I have something to do, and the quiet environment will help me
concentrate on it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hey... By any chance, can you draw landscapes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Not exactly... I'm working on making a paper play based on the
Veggie Caroline movie.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, sorry for not being clear. The thing is... I'm working on making
a paper play based on the Veggie Caroline movie.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The kids aren't able to go see it themselves. They're not at an age
where they can sit still and quiet in a movie theater, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The kids aren't able to go see it themselves. They're not at an age
where they can sit still and quiet in a movie theater, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I could turn it into a paper play that they can enjoy as
well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I've drawn all of the characters, but I'm nowhere near finished with
the background landscapes. Even one takes a considerable time to
draw.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back on it, the movie did take place on an abandoned
island. The landscapes around here would probably make for some
great references.
choice_data_list:
What if you took some pictures for your
backgrounds?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wait, pictures? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've got access to a coastal area, a forest, and even this inn
resembles the abandoned lodge from the movie. This should work out
well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest cutting out her character illustrations and taking photos of
the required landscapes with them, thus creating a paper play with
real-life scenery.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Are you really just a trainer? That's a great idea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you might be a genius.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
All I'll have to do after this is print the photos out in a larger size and
hang them up as my backgrounds!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
All I'll have to do after this is print the photos out in a larger size and
hang them up as my backgrounds!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll have to cut out all the characters, bring them over to the
beach, and then take the pictures. Can I actually do it all before
everyone gets back?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...I figured you would offer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yes, I expected the offer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And you're not the type to give up after I refuse any help. I'm starting
to understand that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I remember before when you said you would be willing to help me out
with anything that was troubling me. I was likely going to ask for your
help directly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's meet in the common room in five minutes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's meet in the common area in five minutes, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We quickly cut out all of the characters, and we have now begun our
photography.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We quickly cut out all of the characters, and we have now begun our
photography.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, scooch farther right! Stretch your arms out as far as you can,
otherwise you'll be in the picture!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? Something up with that window? Oh, that's another great
idea! If we lean them up against it we can take the picture as if they
are standing in the room!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I feel like we need more realism for this running scene. Trainer, can
you do some sprints for me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you think we should put them there? Nice idea! It's like the
characters are hiding in the environment. It should be fun to have
them try and find them!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to wait until tomorrow to take the daytime photos... So that
means this will be our last photo of the night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to wait until tomorrow to take the daytime photos... So that
means this will be our last photo of the night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Try not to move, Trainer. Three, two, one...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Got it. Okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang, boom!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Fireworks!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I guess that festival's almost over, then.
choice_data_list: Do you want to go check it out now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If we went now, all the stalls would surely be closing up shop for the
night. I asked Ryan and the others to get me some souvenirs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I used to go to festivals with Ryan and the other girls quite often back
in the day.

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there are a lot of people here... Ryan, you better not let go of
my hand, okay?

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they have cotton candy! Ryan, over there. See the cotton candy?
Hey, let's get some!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I would hold their hands and drag them all over the place...
choice_data_list: You all are close, I take it.
You all are close, I take it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
My mother was often busy with work, so I would spend a lot of my
time playing with the other Mejiro girls.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ryan was the responsible one, and I always felt at ease around her. I
have a lot of fond memories of the fun times we had.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So when my sister and brother were born, I decided that I would try to
be the same for them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If I can somehow make them feel just as happy and content as I felt
back then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
My chances are few and far between now, however, as I spend most
of my days at the academy and dorms.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When I do get a chance to see them, I often don't know how to best
treat them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I ended up drawing a Veggie Caroline picture last time I was there,
and they started to beg me to draw more.
choice_data_list: So that's why you were practicing so much.
So that's why you were practicing so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Right. It's something I can do fairly well and share with them. So now
this is...
choice_data_list: The paper play is the next big step.
The paper play is the next big step.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Palmer always brought out the paper play theater when we were
younger. Luckily, she still had it around. I had to rely on one of my
big sisters one more time.
choice_data_list:
You kind of have that big sister look to you as
well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Now just what does that mean? You're just playing around,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
A big sister look? I've never thought of myself like that... How do I
give it off?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't think so at all! But maybe if they like the paper play, then
they'll start viewing me as such, even if it's just a little bit...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel like a big sister at all, to be honest. But maybe if they like
the paper play, then they'll start viewing me as such, even if it's just a
little bit...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I do owe you my gratitude. I'll be sure to report back on how
it goes after I return from my upcoming trip.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You've helped me so much with this, so I feel like I owe you a report
on how it goes after I return from my upcoming trip.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's get back. The fireworks seem like they're wrapping up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Let's get back. The fireworks seem like they're wrapping up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
When those two get a little bigger, I would love to be able to bring
them along to some festivals as well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Dober gazes up at the fireworks, she gives a gentle smile. I
can tell that she loves and cares for her younger siblings very deeply.
